mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DELIVERY ( homepage_id, delivery_idx, member_id, member_name, member_cell_phone, member_address, delivery_reqst_date, delivery_return_date, delivery_delete_date, delivery_status, book_title, book_loca_name, book_call_no, book_acsson_no, delivery_return_status, delivery_delete_yn ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, DELIVERY_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{member_id}, #{member_name}, #{member_cell_phone}, #{member_address}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyyMMdd'), #{delivery_return_date}, #{delivery_delete_date}, 0, #{book_title}, #{book_loca_name}, #{book_call_no}, #{book_acsson_no}, #{delivery_return_status}, #{delivery_delete_yn} )
mapper.select: ${pagingTop} SELECT delivery_idx, member_id, member_name, member_cell_phone, member_address, delivery_reqst_date, delivery_return_date, delivery_delete_date, delivery_status, book_title, book_loca_name, book_call_no, book_acsson_no, delivery_return_status FROM DELIVERY WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} ORDER BY delivery_idx DESC ${pagingBottom}

${pagingTop} SELECT delivery_idx, member_id, member_name, member_cell_phone, member_address, delivery_reqst_date, delivery_return_date, delivery_delete_date, delivery_status, book_title, book_loca_name, book_call_no, book_acsson_no, delivery_return_status FROM DELIVERY WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND member_id = #{member_id} AND delivery_delete_yn = 'N' ORDER BY delivery_idx DESC ${pagingBottom}

${pagingTop} SELECT delivery_idx, member_id, member_name, member_cell_phone, member_address, delivery_reqst_date, delivery_return_date, delivery_delete_date, delivery_status, book_title, book_loca_name, book_call_no, book_acsson_no, delivery_return_status FROM DELIVERY WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND member_id = #{member_id} AND delivery_delete_yn = 'N' AND delivery_status = 1 AND delivery_return_status IS NOT NULL ORDER BY delivery_idx DESC ${pagingBottom}

${pagingTop} SELECT delivery_idx, member_id, member_name, member_cell_phone, member_address, delivery_reqst_date, delivery_return_date, delivery_delete_date, delivery_status, book_title, book_loca_name, book_call_no, book_acsson_no, delivery_return_status FROM DELIVERY WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND delivery_delete_yn = 'N' AND delivery_status = 1 AND delivery_return_status IN (1, 2) ORDER BY delivery_return_date DESC ${pagingBottom}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DELIVERY WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} ORDER BY delivery_idx DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DELIVERY WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND member_id = #{member_id} AND delivery_delete_yn = 'N' ORDER BY delivery_idx DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DELIVERY WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND member_id = #{member_id} AND delivery_delete_yn = 'N' AND delivery_status = 1 AND delivery_return_status IS NOT NULL ORDER BY delivery_idx DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DELIVERY WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND delivery_delete_yn = 'N' AND delivery_status = 1 AND delivery_return_status IN (1, 2) ORDER BY delivery_idx DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DELIVERY WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND delivery_delete_yn = 'N' AND (delivery_return_status IS NULL OR delivery_return_status IN (0, 1)) AND member_id = #{member_id} AND book_acsson_no = #{book_acsson_no}
mapper.update: UPDATE DELIVERY SET delivery_status = #{delivery_status}, delivery_return_status = #{delivery_return_status}, delivery_return_date = TO_CHAR(sysdate + 30, 'yyyyMMdd') WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND delivery_idx = #{delivery_idx}
mapper.delete: UPDATE DELIVERY SET delivery_delete_date = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyyMMdd'), delivery_delete_yn = 'Y' WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND delivery_idx = #{delivery_idx}
